# AI Workforce for SMEs

Audience: Singapore SME leaders and operations managers
Brand: Nexius Academy
Tone: practical, operator-led, anti-fluff

## Thesis
SMEs should orchestrate AI coworkers around business workflows instead of buying isolated chat tools.

## Key findings
- AI adoption succeeds when owners define process outcomes before choosing tools. [Source: Nexius workshop notes]
- Human-in-the-loop review matters for customer-facing, financial, and HR decisions. [Source: Governance checklist]
- Practical teams start with one repeatable workflow, measure turnaround time, and expand after audit evidence is available. [Source: SME pilot retrospective]

## Outline
1. Why chat-only AI stalls inside SMEs
2. The AI workforce operating model
3. Governance, audit trails, and human review
4. 30-day implementation roadmap
5. Next steps for Nexius Academy learners

## Slide notes
- Open with the shift from operating tasks to orchestrating AI coworkers.
- Include a simple before/after workflow comparison.
- End with a concrete 30-day roadmap and review checklist.

## Report notes
Summarise the operating model, adoption risks, governance controls, and recommended 30-day pilot sequence. Keep language executive-readable and cite the source labels above.
